metadata.title: States PCS: Arunachal Pradesh GK Questions for APPSC Examinations

questions.question: Which tribe from Arunachal Pradesh is traditionally known for women wearing facial tattoos and nose plugs?
questions.explanation: Apatani women historically wore facial tattoos and nose plugs, a unique cultural marker in Arunachal Pradesh.

questions.question: Who was the first Chief Minister of Arunachal Pradesh?
questions.explanation: Prem Khandu Thungon became the first Chief Minister of Arunachal Pradesh in 1975 when it attained Union Territory status.

questions.question: Which town in Arunachal Pradesh is known as the ‘Land of the Dawn-lit Mountains’?
questions.explanation: Dong village, in Anjaw district, Arunachal Pradesh, is called the ‘Land of the Dawn-lit Mountains’ as it receives India’s first sunlight each day.

questions.question: Most tribal languages spoken in Arunachal Pradesh belong to which language family?
questions.explanation: The majority of tribal languages in Arunachal Pradesh, such as Adi, Nyishi, and Monpa, are classified under the Tibeto-Burman language family.
